channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democratic Socialist Movement Now Targets Colorado
item.description: A 29-year-old socialist with an AOC-like style is challenging a 15-term Democratic congresswoman in Denver.

item.title: Venezuelans continue searching earthquake ruins as focus shifts to humanitarian crisis
item.description: With time running out to find survivors, Venezuelans on Monday searched more collapsed buildings from last week's powerful earthquake.

item.title: U.S. power, not international law, determines Strait of Hormuz access
item.description: The waterway has historically remained open because Tehran knew America would not accept Iranian restrictions.

item.title: Nursing gains 'professional' loan status after ruling; theology loses it
item.description: Graduate nursing and physical therapy students can now access higher federal loans, but theology programs are no longer eligible.
